features.name: Project Review Entrypoint
features.description: Establish README and docs navigation as a future-review map for the harness learning project.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Commit ba1544b added README.md, docs/index.md, and docs/evolution/index.md as the initial review entrypoint.

features.name: Harness Lifecycle Scaffold
features.description: Adapt the harness-creator lifecycle artifacts to this repo without overwriting the existing AGENTS.md contract.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Added project-specific feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, init.sh, AGENTS.md lifecycle pointers, and docs/evolution/0001-harness-lifecycle-bootstrap.md. ./init.sh passed. harness-creator validate-harness returned 100/100.

features.name: Project Context Restoration
features.description: Fill CONTEXT.md with the durable project purpose, boundaries, terminology, and restart assumptions for future sessions.

features.name: Evolution Record Backfill
features.description: Backfill the first concrete docs/evolution stage record for the README and lifecycle bootstrap work.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Added docs/evolution/0001-harness-lifecycle-bootstrap.md with goal, starting state, method, decisions, evidence, reusable conclusions, open questions, and next step.

features.name: Template Boundary Review
features.description: Decide which lifecycle artifacts belong in templates/ and which remain project-specific to this learning repo.

features.name: Agent Operating Contract Slimming
features.description: Reduce AGENTS.md to a short root operating contract and move long OMX/generated reference material into docs.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Slimmed AGENTS.md from 249 lines to 111 lines, moved OMX reference material to docs/workflows/omx-runtime.md, added docs/adr/0001-keep-agents-md-as-root-operating-contract.md, updated CONTEXT.md terminology, and verified with ./init.sh plus harness-creator validate-harness 100/100.
